title: BTCTurk - Rekt
relevance_summary: Private key leak leading to multi-chain fund drain

prevention.rule: Block any tx that involves transferring large sums from hot wallets

red_flags: Large sums transferred from hot wallets
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that involves transferring large sums from hot wallets
summary: BTCTurk suffered a $51.7 million loss due to a private key leak, leading to a multi-chain fund drain. A guard could have detected and blocked large transfers from hot wallets.
